Bus Timings

F22 Bus Timings Al Qusais Industrial Area 2 Terminus to Stadium Bus Station

January 20, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The F22 bus route offers a vital connection between Al Qusais Industrial Area 2 Terminus and Stadium Bus Station · 5, catering to commuters in Dubai. This route is essential for passengers traveling between the industrial zones and major transport hubs.

Route Name F22
Route Description Al Qusais Industrial Area 2 Terminus - Stadium Bus Station · 5
Total Distance Approximately 5 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 15 minutes
Operational Hours 04:30 to 00:10 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Bus F22 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus F22 operates with the following schedule:

Bus F22 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the F22 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

Traveling on the F22 bus costs AED 3. This affordable fare makes it easy for passengers to travel comfortably and efficiently between key destinations in Dubai. The price ensures that the bus remains a practical option for both daily commuting and occasional travel. With its value-for-money fare, the F22 bus helps make exploring Dubai’s various neighborhoods more accessible and budget-friendly.

Bus Booking

Currently, there is no specific online booking system available for the F22 bus route. Passengers can board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route. For real-time updates and route information, the RTA Dubai app is a useful tool for checking schedules and planning your journey. This app also provides information on potential delays or changes to the schedule, enhancing your travel experience.

Bus Route

The F22 bus route covers the following stops:

  1. Al Qusais Industrial Area 2 Terminus

  2. Al Huraiz Establishment

  3. Al Qusais, Public Transport Depot

  4. Dubai Carmel School

  5. Sahara Center

  6. ENOC

  7. NMC Hospital

  8. Mai Tower

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Nahda 1, DEWA

  2. Stadium Bus Station · 5

Bus F22 Station Overview

Al Qusais Industrial Area 2 Terminus

Al Qusais Industrial Area 2 Terminus is a significant bus station situated in the industrial sector of Al Qusais. This terminus serves as a major transportation hub for the industrial and commercial areas nearby, providing vital connectivity for workers and business professionals.

The station’s strategic location ensures easy access to various local industries and businesses, making it a crucial part of the transportation network in the Al Qusais Industrial Area.

Intersection at Al Qusais Industrial Area 3, Mustaqeem Mosque Bus Stop

This strategic location provides passengers with convenient connections between these diverse routes, facilitating efficient travel across the region. The stop is equipped with essential amenities, enhancing the overall travel experience for commuters navigating through the Al Qusais area.

Stadium Bus Station · 5

Stadium Bus Station · 5 is a prominent transit hub located near major sports venues and facilities.

It offers essential amenities such as sheltered waiting areas, real-time schedule updates, and ticketing services to ensure a comfortable travel experience. Its location close to stadiums and sports facilities makes it a convenient option for sports fans and event-goers, providing seamless access to and from major sporting events and local attractions.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

  1. Sahara Center: This is a major shopping mall and entertainment center located in Al Nahda. It offers a variety of retail outlets, dining options, and entertainment facilities, making it a popular destination for both shopping and leisure activities.

  2. Dubai Carmel School: While primarily an educational institution, the area around the school may offer local community events and activities that could be of interest to visitors.

  3. NMC Hospital: Although primarily a healthcare facility, NMC Hospital is part of the broader healthcare tourism sector in Dubai, providing high-quality medical services that attract international patients.

4.

These stops along the F22 bus route provide convenient access to significant commercial, educational, and healthcare facilities in Dubai.

Journey Experience

Starting in Al Qusais Industrial Area, a bustling hub for businesses and factories, the bus gradually transitions into residential areas like Al Nahda, known for its parks and family-friendly atmosphere.

Along the way, passengers can enjoy views of local landmarks such as Al Mamzar Beach Park, a popular spot for leisure and relaxation. The journey ends at Stadium Bus Station, close to Al Ahli Stadium, a key venue for local sports events.

Travelling with Careem

The fare for this journey ranges from AED 28 to AED 33, offering a convenient and cost-effective way to reach your destination. With real-time updates and efficient service, the Careem app ensures a smooth and hassle-free travel experience across Dubai’s public transport network.

The F22 bus route offers a reliable and affordable travel option across key areas of Dubai, connecting Al Qusais Industrial Area 2 Terminus to Stadium Bus Station · 5. With frequent service and a comprehensive network of stops, it caters effectively to daily commuters and occasional travelers. The AED 3 fare ensures cost-effective travel, making it a convenient choice for various needs. For up-to-date schedules and route information, the RTA Dubai app is recommended.
